name: Campus Living Centres (all properties)
notes: VERIFIED plain HTML. One board covers every CLC property in Canada (TRU Kamloops, Okanagan College Kelowna, Algonquin Ottawa, Seneca King City, etc).

name: King's University College (Western)
notes: VERIFIED. LIVE POSTING as of Jul 2026: Residence Coordinator, closes Jul 8 2026, ref 202606-05C.

name: CACUSS Career Centre
notes: National aggregator. Confirm with --dry-run; switch mode to js if empty.

name: OACUHO Job Postings
notes: CONFIRMED live via research: plain CGI HTML, no JS needed. Ontario housing-officer aggregator - highest signal for ON.

name: UBC (Van + Okanagan) - Workday
notes: Workday JSON API. Tenant/site VERIFIED. Covers both UBC Vancouver and UBC Okanagan (Kelowna).

name: McGill - Workday
notes: Site slug CONFIRMED via research (McGill_Careers, capitalized).

name: University of Ottawa - Workday
notes: Workday CONFIRMED via research. French site is the fr-CA variant, not scraped separately.

name: Brock University - Workday
notes: Workday CONFIRMED via research, live postings visible.

name: University of Alberta - Oracle
notes: JS render via Playwright. TOP TARGET. CONFIRMED: the ?keyword= param does NOT filter server-side - page just shows the full site-wide posting list (14 as of Jul 2026); scraper text-scans the whole rendered list regardless, so this still works. Also set the portal's native alert as backup.

name: MacEwan University
notes: JS render via Playwright. Live-in role with furnished suite historically.

name: University of Calgary
notes: Native alerts available too. If dry-run finds nothing when jobs exist, replace with the search-results URL for 'residence'.

name: U of T (all campuses)
notes: SuccessFactors portal, covers St. George/UTM/UTSC. NOTE: federated colleges (Victoria, Trinity, St Mike's, Woodsworth, New, Innis, University College) hire separately on their own HR pages - not covered here, add separately if URLs found.

name: Toronto Metropolitan University (TMU)
notes: PeopleSoft Fluid UI confirmed via research. Posted Residence Life Manager, Programming in past cycles - active shop. No keyword URL param; scraper text-scans full list.

name: York University
notes: Technomedia ATS confirmed via research, live postings visible. Session-encoded URLs - scraper text-scans full list (will include noise like 'Housing Custodian', excluded by our filter terms).

name: McMaster University
notes: PeopleSoft HCM, fluid/JS-rendered, confirmed via research.

name: Wilfrid Laurier University
notes: SAP SuccessFactors '/go/' listing page is server-rendered (confirmed via research), unlike the SPA version. Posted Residence Life Area Coordinator Nov 2025.

name: Waterloo - iCIMS
notes: iCIMS search URL pattern, native email alerts also available.

name: University of Guelph
notes: SAP SuccessFactors (Angular career site) confirmed via research. Posted Residence Life Manager Apr 2026.

name: Western University
notes: PeopleSoft Fluid confirmed via research. NOTE: actual student-leadership 'Residence Staff' hiring runs separately via housing.uwo.ca, not this ATS - this board is for staff-level RLC/RLM postings only. Huron and King's affiliates hire on their own pages (King's already covered above).

name: Carleton University
notes: NJOYN confirmed via research, live postings visible. No keyword GET param - scraper text-scans full list.

name: Queen's University
notes: NJOYN ('CareerQ') confirmed via research, ~40 live postings. URL contains a tbtoken that may expire - re-verify if dry-run starts failing.

name: Ontario Tech University
notes: Cornerstone OnDemand (CSOD) confirmed via research. Verify employer on any match (university vs CLC-operated residence).

name: University of Windsor
notes: Oracle Fusion/Cloud HCM ('UWinsite People') confirmed via research.

name: Trent University
notes: LOW CONFIDENCE - research agent found this via HR page link but the 'test' in the domain is suspicious; may not be the live production ATS. Verify manually before enabling.

name: Concordia University (Montreal)
notes: SAP SuccessFactors confirmed via research.

name: Concordia University of Edmonton
notes: StartDate ATS, hash-routed SPA - distinct school from Concordia Montreal above. If Playwright can't render hash-routed content, disable and check manually.

name: Dalhousie University
notes: CONFIRMED via research: PeopleAdmin, query param verified live ('View Results (2)'). Biggest Atlantic residence operation.

name: Saint Mary's University (Halifax)
notes: Research agent could not identify the staff ATS platform (only found student-facing Career360/Symplicity); needs manual follow-up. Same city as Dalhousie - two employers, one move.

name: Memorial University
notes: Plain HTML listing confirmed via research, no vendor ATS branding. careers.mun.ca subdomain requires CAS login (internal-only), avoid that one.

name: U of Manitoba
notes: DLGL-branded system. Research fetch hit a browser-compatibility gate page (suggests JS dependency) - if dry-run keeps returning nothing, verify manually.

name: University of Winnipeg
notes: NorthStar ATS found via web search only, not independently confirmed live (direct site fetch returned 403). Enable once verified. Smaller residence op than U of Manitoba.

name: U of Saskatchewan
notes: Posted Assistant Manager Student Life Mar 2026 - active shop. If dry-run empty when jobs exist, paste search-results URL.

name: University of Regina
notes: PeopleAdmin confirmed via research (61 postings, keyword field present); query string constructed by analogy to Dalhousie/Lethbridge, not independently tested with 'residence' specifically.

name: Mount Royal University
notes: HRSmart-based TMS confirmed via research. Posted Residence Life Coordinator in 2024 cycle. Keyword URL param not confirmed - scraper text-scans full list.

name: University of Lethbridge
notes: PeopleAdmin CONFIRMED via research, exact query string captured live (position_type_id=1 is non-academic staff).

name: SFU
notes: Oracle Taleo confirmed via research (38 live postings seen). Same metro as UBC - two employers, one move.

name: University of Victoria
notes: CONFIRMED via research: plain fetch returns live postings, including an 'Associate Director, Residence Life' as of Apr 2026 (won't match our filter - Director isn't a ROLE_TERM - but signals coordinator-level movement may follow).

name: Indeed Canada
notes: VERIFIED: public search results, no login required. Found real matches (e.g. 'Residence Coordinator', 'Residence Coordinator / Case Manager') via plain anchor-tag scan. Expect noise from non-university employers (group homes, youth services) - title filter already excludes most non-role terms; she reviews details herself.

name: LinkedIn Jobs
notes: VERIFIED: logged-out search results render enough postings to scrape (found 'Residence Life Coordinator', 'Residence Facility Operations Coordinator', etc). No login/session needed - deliberately NOT using credentials here since LinkedIn aggressively flags automated logins; this is anonymous browsing only. Results may be capped/rate-limited over time - if matches drop to zero unexpectedly, re-verify with a manual browser visit before assuming it's broken.

name: Glassdoor Canada
notes: VERIFIED: public search results, no login required, found real matches (e.g. 'Residence Coordinator', 'Residence Coordinator / Case Manager'). Same noise caveat as Indeed - non-university employers will appear, filter + manual review handles it.
